subcodes.first_line: The Hands of the Cause of God have ever been and continue to be nurturers of the people
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایادی امر الهی مربی عباد بوده و هستند قلم اعلی کل را وصیت فرمود بتربیت اولاد
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @Hands of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education
